stocks.impact_theory: Palantir is set to report Q1 2026 earnings after market close on May 4, with expectations of 74% YoY revenue growth to $1.54B and EPS $0.28 (115% growth). Amid AI hype, AIP platform momentum in commercial sector (U.S. commercial +137% prior quarter) drives sentiment. Economic implications: Validates enterprise AI orchestration dominance. Market psychology: High anticipation vs. recent 20% YTD pullback creates FOMO rebound potential. Historical parallels: NVDA pre-split earnings rallies. Analogies: Like CRM in cloud shift (ontology lock-in), or CUDA monopoly in AI stack.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment highly positive on earnings beat potential (implied move ±10%, below historical 13%), web news highlights Wedbush $230 PT. Oil tensions secondary boost for gov contracts.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if miss on commercial guidance; -10% downside.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: High expectations lead to sell-the-news; Anthropic competition erodes moat.

stocks.justification: Strong X buzz, analyst upgrades, historical earnings beats support high conviction.

stocks.impact_theory: Brent crude +7% to $120 on Iran Hormuz tensions (US ship reports, Trump escort plan), UAE OPEC exit weakens cartel control. Implications: Supply disruption risk boosts US producers. Psychology: Fear premium drives oil rally, benefits integrated majors. Parallels: 2019 Abqaiq attack +15% oil spike. Analogies: Like weather event squeezing supply (Hurricane Katrina 2005), or cartel fracture (1986 Saudi flood).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts bullish on XOM amid oil surge; web confirms Hormuz risk-off for airlines, on for energy.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Diplomatic resolution deflates premium; recession curbs demand.

stocks.justification: Geopolitical catalysts persistent, historical oil reactions reliable.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 2026 loss $0.05/share vs. expected -$0.12, shares +11.5%. Implications: Cost controls amid consumer slowdown. Psychology: Relief rally post-restructuring. Parallels: 2020 COVID beats. Analogies: Like turning ship in storm, or diet success after indulgence.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings surprise shifts sentiment positive; low visibility but volume spike.

stocks.justification: Solid beat but cyclical sector vulnerable.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 earnings beat, shares +4.5%. Implications: MRI tech demand in hospitals. Psychology: Niche growth story. Parallels: Post-pandemic medtech recovery. Analogies: Like EV charger in auto boom.
stocks.justification: Good beat, but small cap volatility.

stocks.impact_theory: Shares +57% to $9.35 on massive volume 46M (vs avg 1M), possible acquisition rumors or travel rebound amid Hormuz stability hopes. Implications: Corporate travel surge. Psychology: Short squeeze/momentum. Parallels: Post-COVID travel pops. Analogies: Like airline rally on vax news.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Extreme volume/mover; X chatter on travel.
